phases.name: Discover
phases.description: Interview phase: classify task, gather context, conduct interview, write spec

steps.name: context-collect
steps.description: Spawn haiku context collector subagents (parallel, count scales with complexity)

steps.name: interview
steps.description: Present interview questions to user and collect answers (user_wait)

steps.name: write-spec
steps.description: Write task-spec.md using template from collected context and interview answers

phases.name: Design
phases.description: Architecture phase: Architect subagent designs the full implementation plan

steps.name: design
steps.description: Architect subagent (opus) reads task-spec.md and produces architecture.md

steps.name: validate-design
steps.description: Validate architecture.md has Interface Contracts and Task List; display summary checkpoint

phases.name: Build
phases.description: Implementation phase: Executor subagents implement tasks level by level

steps.name: level-start
steps.description: Start an executor level: identify all tasks at current dependency level

steps.name: execute
steps.description: Spawn Executor subagents in parallel (one per task at current level)

steps.name: commit
steps.description: Commit completed level results with [forge] prefix

steps.name: next-level
steps.description: Advance to next dependency level or proceed to Phase 4 if all levels done

phases.name: Verify
phases.description: Verification phase: cross-file analysis, fix loop, final commit

steps.name: verify
steps.description: Verifier subagent (opus) performs cross-file call-graph analysis on all changed files

steps.name: fix
steps.description: Fixer subagent (sonnet, upgrades to opus) resolves cross-file and per-file issues

steps.name: re-verify
steps.description: Re-run Verifier after fixes; loop back to fix if issues remain (up to max_fix_iterations)

steps.name: done
steps.description: Archive pipeline, final [forge] commit, mark pipeline complete

fix_mode.description: Standalone error-fixing mode triggered by /fix. Reuses Phase 4 steps only.

S.description: Simple tasks skip Phase 2 (Design) and go directly from Phase 1 to Phase 3

fields.task_slug: string — short slug for archive naming
fields.current_level: number — current executor dependency level (Phase 3 only)
fields.fix_loop_count: number — number of fix iterations completed (Phase 4 only)
fields.waiting_for_user: boolean — true while waiting for interview answers

phase.description: Phase can only advance by 1 (max). Never regress. S complexity skips 1->3.
